title: Support disabling task by name
body:
Currently UVM tests/40phasing/50phase_controls/00basic fails with 

`%Error-UNSUPPORTED: file.v:37:10: Unsupported: disabling task by name`

From doing roughly this:

```
class driver;
     task get_and_send();
       forever begin
         ...
       end
     endtask
     task post_shutdown_phase(uvm_phase phase);
       disable get_and_send;  // <---
```

The existing test case for this error will be extended for this case shortly.

Related-ish to #5432
